lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no signs of wear or damage. The interior is in like-new condition, showing no wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and have been maintained to the highest standard.
This car is in good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a reliable daily driver for several years. The exterior shows its age with some noticeable paint fading on the hood and roof, as well as a few minor scuffs and small door dings consistent with regular use. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though it may soon require routine maintenance such as new brake pads and a suspension check to ensure continued longevity. The interior is generally clean, though the driver's seat shows some moderate wear. It is a functional, honest vehicle for someone prioritizing utility over aesthetics.
Looking for a rewarding project? This car is a fantastic opportunity for a DIY enthusiast! While it is in poor condition and needs some mechanical and cosmetic attention, it’s

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor signs of use including a few small paint chips. The interior is clean with light wear on the driver's seat. Mechanically, the engine and transmission operate smoothly with no known issues.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior paint retains a strong finish, though there are some minor stone chips on the front fascia and a few light surface scratches consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is clean, the upholstery is in great shape, and all electronic features are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is solid and drives smoothly, offering a reliable experience for its next owner.

Presenting a refined example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated for the driver who values both performance and proven reliability. Maintained to a high standard, it exhibits a clean aesthetic and robust mechanical health, ensuring a seamless transition to its next owner. This offering represents a sophisticated acquisition, providing a premium experience that remains accessible. We invite you to experience the integrity and poise of this well-appointed motorcar.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in solid shape and has been well-maintained, perfect for anyone looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road. It runs smoothly and is ready for its next owner to take it on some new adventures! Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it in person!
This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2
Reliable vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Mechanically sound.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and serves as a reliable daily driver that still turns heads. The exterior finish retains a deep luster, showing only the minor road wear one would expect from a well-loved car. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean; the leather upholstery is supple with minimal creasing, and every feature—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, it is sound, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule. It offers a smooth, responsive ride with crisp shifting and confident braking. We’ve recently completed a full multi-point inspection, fresh oil service, and a professional detail, ensuring it’s ready for its next owner to drive away with peace of mind. This is a solid, dependable choice for a buyer looking for a quality vehicle that has been treated with respect.

Presenting a distinguished vehicle that exemplifies consistent maintenance and mechanical integrity. This selection offers a refined driving experience, characterized by reliable performance and a well-preserved interior. Thoroughly inspected to meet our rigorous professional standards, it represents an exceptional opportunity for the sophisticated motorist seeking an optimal balance of prestige and utility.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this model offers a balanced synthesis of performance and long-term value. We invite you to experience a standard of automotive quality that distinguishes our curated inventory.

Hey there! I'm parting with my trusty car, and it’s been such a reliable ride for me. It’s in really solid shape, runs like a dream, and has been well-loved and looked after. If you're looking for a dependable set of wheels that still looks great in the driveway, this is the one! I’d love for it to go to a good home, so feel free to reach out and come see it for yourself!

This 997-generation Carrera features the legendary 3.6L horizontally-opposed flat-six, delivering a linear power band and a visceral 7,200 RPM redline. The M96/05 power plant is paired with a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transaxle, ensuring tactile gear engagement and optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains remarkably composed, utilizing a sophisticated multi-link rear suspension geometry and McPherson struts up front for razor-sharp turn-in and high-speed stability. Recent service includes a comprehensive inspection of the Variocam Plus system and a cooling system pressure test. Equipped with four-piston monobloc calipers and cross-drilled ventilated rotors, the braking performance remains consistent under thermal load. This is a mechanically sound, driver-focused example with a taut drivetrain and excellent throttle response, ideal for the enthusiast seeking a pure, naturally aspirated experience.
Used car. Good condition. Clean interior. Reliable performance. Title in hand.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive overall shape. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish with only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery remains supportive and comfortable, showing just light natural creasing on the driver's seat. Mechanically, it performs beautifully—the engine is responsive, the gear shifts are seamless, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. We’ve recently completed a full multi-point inspection, replaced the brake pads, and performed a fresh oil service. It’s a solid, reliable choice for anyone seeking luxury and performance without the new-car price tag.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer. Meticulously maintained and mechanically sound, it offers a refined driving experience and aesthetic appeal that demonstrates consistent care. An exemplary choice for those seeking performance and long-term reliability.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, curated for the driver who demands both mechanical integrity and refined aesthetics. This unit has undergone a comprehensive professional assessment to ensure consistent performance and structural excellence. The interior cabin remains exceptionally well-preserved, while the exterior reflects a history of diligent care. This offering represents a sophisticated balance of engineering reliability and long-term value, positioned as a premier choice for the discerning professional.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it's honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for its next adventure! This car is perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend getaways. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you're going to love how it handles!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8, delivering linear power delivery up to its 8,400 RPM redline. Equipped with a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory variable M differential lock, this chassis offers exceptional mechanical grip and turn-in precision. The vehicle retains its structural integrity with the weight-saving carbon fiber roof and features EDC (Electronic Damper Control) for adjustable damping rates. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service, ensuring the high-revving valvetrain remains robust. A driver-focused example with a clean subframe and minimal bushing deflection, ready for spirited canyon carving or track-day duty.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Regularly serviced. Minor cosmetic wear. Clean title. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive condition, offering a perfect balance of reliability and style. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful road use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery shows minimal wear, and all electronic features—from the dual-zone climate control to the infotainment system—operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that has benefited from regular, documented oil changes and recent preventative maintenance. With a fresh set of tires and firm, quiet suspension, it delivers a comfortable and confident driving experience. This is a well-cared-for example that is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without the need for additional investment.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a refined balance of performance and reliability. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this unit demonstrates consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. A premier choice for those seeking professional-grade quality and enduring value in their next automotive investment.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers an optimal balance of performance and long-term value. Every component has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability and roadworthiness.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and it's looking for a new home! It’s been super reliable and is in really solid shape, perfect for zipping around town or hitting the highway. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready to go whenever you are. You’re going to love how it drives—come check it out!

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a perfect balance of reliability and style. The exterior retains a high-gloss shine, showing only minor, expected signs of road use such as light stone chips on the front bumper. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and a fully functional suite of electronics, including the original infotainment system and climate control. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and has been serviced at regular intervals; a recent professional inspection confirms the integrity of the transmission, brakes, and suspension. It delivers a confident, comfortable driving experience with no unusual noises or vibrations. This is an honest, solid car that has been treated with respect and is ready for many more miles of dependable service.

This vehicle represents a distinguished balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and displaying consistent mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience. The exterior and interior reflect careful stewardship, ensuring that this automobile remains a premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, high-caliber investment.
